name: Jeremy Lin
title: Former NBA Point Guard
bio: American-Taiwanese former professional basketball player, best known for 'Linsanity' — his breakout stretch with the New York Knicks in 2012. First American of Chinese/Taiwanese descent to play in the NBA.
faith: A devout Christian who has spoken extensively about finding his identity in Christ rather than basketball. He has shared his testimony at churches and conferences, emphasizing that his worth comes from God, not performance.
